name: Bob Casey
subject: “The last full measure of devotion”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Every grassroots contribution adds up in a big way.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=95%2E552475%2EbcXDkz)
Peter,
On this Memorial Day and every day, we owe our fallen military, our veterans, and their families a huge debt of gratitude.
Memorial Day was first observed 159 years ago in Boalsburg, Pennsylvania to honor Union soldiers who gave their lives during the Civil War. In the years since, many more courageous soldiers have fought to keep us and our Nation safe.
Today, I hope you will join me and take a moment to remember the brave souls who gave their lives in service to our Nation in what President Abraham Lincoln described as "the last full measure of devotion."
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

name: Greg Landsman
subject: This Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
Today, we honor the selfless Americans who lost their lives fighting for our nation and our core values of freedom, liberty, and democracy. These men and women made the ultimate sacrifice, and for that, we are forever indebted to their service.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64003611/408694826/-1268629450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzU2MTY0Ny00ZWZlLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7tpw27m-jkXAbwpCsMQFDJmaLrkc_tT8mCmiRcQiq_o=&emci=a9393c0b-0bfc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1c561647-4efe-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10283101)
---
Friend,

Today, we honor the selfless Americans who lost their lives fighting for our nation and our core values of freedom, liberty, and democracy.

These men and women made the ultimate sacrifice, and for that, we are forever indebted to their service.

I encourage you to join me today in taking a moment to reflect on what this day means to you and to our country. This year, especially, I’m thinking about the ongoing fight for our fundamental freedoms and democratic principles here at home. So while we can never truly repay the bravery and sacrifice of those who died in service, we can commit ourselves to preserving the principles they fought for. I hope you’ll join me in doing just that.

To the brave men and women who are veterans of our armed forces or are currently serving, we say thank you.

With appreciation for all those who have served,

_Greg_
| | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Box 68033, Cincinnati, OH 45206
www.landsmanforcongress.com

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: Today we honor American heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64004133/408694956/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20230529_PT_memorialday_0_3MO_TeamPanetta_NA_NA_xylazine&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjEwZGNiZC00ZWZlLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iaJgK4yNeltwUE76PwX9ymGIW6IUf0vepvRPOMD3cA0=&emci=a18bed46-1cfc-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7610dcbd-4efe-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

Every Memorial Day, we formally honor the men and women of the Armed Services who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend freedom and uphold our values.

Every day as we live our lives, I firmly believe that we must appreciate that sacrifice but must also be mindful and grateful for all who serve, as well as their families who support them.

As a veteran of the Afghanistan War, a member of the House Armed Services Committee, a co-founder of the Congressional For Country Caucus, and federal representative for veterans in California's 19th Congressional District, I will continue to fight for federal legislation that guarantees care for veterans and active duty servicemembers, lowers their housing costs, helps protect their lives, and provides support to their families.

Please join me in honoring the legacy of those who served and sacrificed on this Memorial Day and every day forward by continuing to stand up to ensure freedom for all Americans and step up to enhance the everlasting values of America.

– Jimmy Panetta
---

clean_body: | Peter, Every Memorial Day, we formally honor the men and women of the Armed Services who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend freedom and uphold our values. Every day as we live our lives, I firmly believe that we must appreciate that sacrifice but must also be mindful and grateful for all who serve, as well as their families who support them. As a veteran of the Afghanistan War, a member of the House Armed Services Committee, a co-founder of the Congressional For Country Caucus, and federal representative for veterans in California's 19th Congressional District, I will continue to fight for federal legislation that guarantees care for veterans and active duty servicemembers, lowers their housing costs, helps protect their lives, and provides support to their families. Please join me in honoring the legacy of those who served and sacrificed on this Memorial Day and every day forward by continuing to stand up to ensure freedom for all Americans and step up to enhance the everlasting values of America. – Jimmy Panetta If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States ** **

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: We’re doing things differently

body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=13457a8f56f742b198ff549b8747093be733cae9611d30db0691223c5ba1fbeaf0ef92dad2222dd51e7fef9a97333a98878d722e50555f6e1dee8a0f3148933ee5d0e46a1d8b819e3f1696b3862bf997

Good morning, Peter,

I wanted to reach out personally and welcome you to our team. But more than just saying hello, I want to make you a promise.

Peter, I have to tell you—I hate how some politicians are treating their supporters.

I bet a lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They’re probably making you feel terrible if you don’t contribute too, aren’t they?

At Team DeSantis we’re taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program’s foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can’t afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating. When we tell you about our internal fundraising goals, those are real numbers, based on what we need to build a winning campaign.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That’s what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign you want to invest in, then please become a recurring donor to our campaign today.

| Team,

Each Memorial Day, we take time to honor those who gave what Abraham Lincoln called their last full measure of devotion to our country and democracy.

The men and women who have lost their lives in service to our nation embody the very best of America.

Today, our thoughts are with them, and with the Gold Star families, friends, and loved ones struggling with their loss.

Thank you to all who have given everything for our country. We’re grateful for their service and sacrifice every day.

– Team DASS

---

clean_body: | = Peter, Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $3 before our end-of-month deadline? What if I told you our team relies almost entirely on donations we receive from folks like you to fund our work? What if I mentioned that our plans to elect more women and young people in 2024 are already in the works? Or that are a ton of great candidates who need our help, but we’ll have to scale back our support if we don’t hit our fundraising goals? Or what if I told you that your donation could be the one to put us over the top? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for everything you do. I’m so grateful we can count on your support. Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Today we pause to remember
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,Every Memorial Day, we take time to honor the brave servicemembers who made the ultimate sacrifice in order to protect the freedoms we enjoy as Americans.

We owe endless gratitude to everyone who has ever put on a uniform to fight for our country.

This Memorial Day, I’m once again recommitting to ensuring that our military members returning from the battlefield are taken care of by the country they served. That means fighting for their healthcare, adequate housing, and mental health services.

As a combat veteran, I’ll never stop speaking up for our heroes and heroines. Please join me in honoring those who gave their lives for our country.

God bless our troops and God bless America,

Mike Thompson Member of Congress

Boebert – ‘No Excuse’](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8fjo2gr0ajcpkou8r61i0scgrtloa9lq9s1jfjo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c5g60pj2cth2bs)
---
Democratic Senator John Fetterman faced criticism from Republican Representative Lauren Boebert of Colorado for his choice of attire during a Senate press conference. Fetterman attended the event wearing a hoodie and shorts, which Boebert deemed as inappropriate. Taking to Twitter, Boebert expressed her disapproval, emphasizing the significance of dressing professionally for such a job. |

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: On this Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
|
---
Team, on this Memorial Day, I wanted to take a moment with you to remember the brave men and women who have given their lives in service to our country.

Service members put it all on the line to keep us safe at home and abroad. They make the ultimate sacrifice to uphold the values of democracy and freedom that the United States was founded on.

We can never lose sight of their sacrifices, and need to make sure that we always work to honor their legacies and heroism. As a member of Congress, I'm committed to doing all that I can to support our veterans.

I hope you and your family have a great Memorial Day and remember to always honor the heroes of our great nation.

Jared

Peter,

A lot of campaigns are urging you to donate before their self-constructed fundraising deadlines. They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they?

At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating.

No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies.

That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then **_[please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=df9e16eef86544e9af409627e34aef8c&_e=-2LtFN0_OL9In_eM8T56qtrH8iQBkXewm-RIQkMtrACqt2n8b7v3NTT4jbm-l5VRdvFjeKrC38FGtcFHyWBqq4IWxVBU9ResPUQ7kb4K7nGBiClIJdo7mn21O70gyf5dLn8LMDrf9N-0g7aeCoAUiBmROAaR4lrhd6oJ7cJl7WR-9DNcu6RXZ1lOp6XXn438vHe7q354qOSt1rNHoWgH3D2XGTcy9AFZFn7spxJu0ANZeB7ueYwSio3KHyrri_omBIx2Nd1g9R2uXFhHlpN1bsnGiRARDiVTtMIAyVPWpbWzY8RQm1zuvZpoVIQSz8t7QahtkeDNfB-3pmILZrZsZqv8HN_aNzJV2P5Q7NAr10VzXSgikD6gy7KQ_TBW5stVlU070oTHMQGbHtCaI974NXkQudAuZhoQBNM9an1Gaz0ALXrJLKfHA2IpGQRj42yI "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. **Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=df9e16eef86544e9af409627e34aef8c&_e=-2LtFN0_OL9In_eM8T56qtrH8iQBkXewm-RIQkMtrABBH7wsEeCz1tMCiQkLJiU-8fnhnq2CoswJNsgMrJLEfNjLMmFPvXn6A76k44Fxxrm9uhKYeCoQeqU89CV1qrk8QSSpWKjwK9LZbrOD95JVWCJmVuLGt-Ns0aNb07InnD8A49PDM8yqQGHMNdCoXS3Dfzpub4eTbyLGtIuKuoDysEPU3DNkp1C09hj037LeazG-d5EBL9WhKy7d36V9Ko1l4xs_ldJu-PzSHUeM5P44JQ%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

They're probably making you feel terrible if you don't contribute too, aren't they? At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach. Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank. Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it. You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating. No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies. That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House. If that sounds like the kind of campaign, you want to be a part of today then "please join Team DeSantis today by chipping in any amount you can afford. " | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Let's show the country we love that we're willing to fight for it. Chip in today to join Team DeSantis. Yours in freedom, | Ron DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315

The debt limit crisis is the latest reminder that MAGA Republicans are dangerous for our country. |

Peter, I know you’re enjoying your long weekend, so I’ll make this brief. Yesterday, we received news that the White House has struck an agreement in principle with House Republicans to avoid a catastrophic default on our past debts. I’m grateful for President Biden’s hard work during this Memorial Day weekend to reach this agreement and ensure we don’t default in the face of hostage-taking behavior from the Republicans. While we’re still waiting to learn more about all the details, one thing is for certain: **This was completely avoidable.** Republicans manufactured this crisis and — by their own admission — this was an act of political extortion. President Trump sat down with Mark Levin to discuss the most pressing issues facing our country: _from border security, to the economy, to foreign policy._

**You see, President Trump is not a career politician. Instead, he’s a builder, an innovator, and a deal-maker with decades of _real-world experience_.**
_He knew how to build and foster relationships with world leaders to stop our enemies from terrorizing us and to stop our allies from taking advantage of us._
But President Trump’s America First agenda has also made him an enemy of the Deep State and the entrenched political ruling class.
As a result, President Trump has been censored, deplatformed, framed, slandered, impeached, arrested, and targeted in endless witch hunts.

clean_body: In case you missed it last night. | | | Friend, President Trump sat down with Mark Levin to discuss the most pressing issues facing our country: from border security, to the economy, to foreign policy. As Crooked Joe Biden brings us to the brink of World War III, President Trump and Mark Levin noted that there were NO NEW WARS during the Trump Administration. You see, President Trump is not a career politician. Instead, he’s a builder, an innovator, and a deal-maker with decades of real-world experience. He knew how to build and foster relationships with world leaders to stop our enemies from terrorizing us and to stop our allies from taking advantage of us. But President Trump’s America First agenda has also made him an enemy of the Deep State and the entrenched political ruling class. As a result, President Trump has been censored, deplatformed, framed, slandered, impeached, arrested, and targeted in endless witch hunts. As Mark Levin said... “There are very few people who can sit there and speak the way you do from subject to subject – if people would let you speak and actually listen to you. While you have enormous pressure on your shoulders with these grand juries and other things going on – and you still are able to do it. That is absolutely remarkable.” Despite everything going on, President Trump is still able to keep fighting the good fight. And the truth is that YOU are the source of his courage, his resolve, and his hope. If you’re doing poorly right now due to Biden’s policies, please just hit the back button and do not donate. When President Trump is back in the White House, our economy will come ROARING BACK. Don’t you worry! But if you can help, our May end-of-month fundraising deadline is on Wednesday, May 31 at 11:59 P.M. – and we need your help to ensure we OUTRAISE Crooked Joe and win back the White House. | Thank you, Team Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Peter,
I wanted to take a moment to reflect on the true significance of Memorial Day and pay tribute to the courageous men and women who have made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our great nation.

Memorial Day reminds us of the tremendous price paid by our military members and their families. It is a day to honor the selflessness, valor, and dedication displayed by those who fought to protect the freedoms we hold dear.

In our beautiful state of Oregon, we are no strangers to the sacrifices made by our heroes. From the lush forests of the Cascades to the rugged coastline of the Pacific, our landscapes have been witness to the bravery and commitment of our servicemen and servicewomen. We owe them an immeasurable debt of gratitude.

Let us remember the fallen soldiers who rest in peace, their memory etched in the fabric of our nation's history. It is thanks to their sacrifices that we can enjoy the liberties we often take for granted. Their valor and love for our country are a constant reminder of the enduring spirit that binds us as a nation.

May God bless our fallen heroes and their families.

Sincerely,

clean_body: | | | | \- - -| Peter, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on the true significance of Memorial Day and pay tribute to the courageous men and women who have made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our great nation. Memorial Day reminds us of the tremendous price paid by our military members and their families. It is a day to honor the selflessness, valor, and dedication displayed by those who fought to protect the freedoms we hold dear. In our beautiful state of Oregon, we are no strangers to the sacrifices made by our heroes. From the lush forests of the Cascades to the rugged coastline of the Pacific, our landscapes have been witness to the bravery and commitment of our servicemen and servicewomen. We owe them an immeasurable debt of gratitude. Let us remember the fallen soldiers who rest in peace, their memory etched in the fabric of our nation's history. It is thanks to their sacrifices that we can enjoy the liberties we often take for granted. Their valor and love for our country are a constant reminder of the enduring spirit that binds us as a nation. May God bless our fallen heroes and their families. Sincerely, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- =

name: Adam Frisch
subject: what my dad taught me about abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64013885/408705710/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjMyMDQ0ZS02MGZlLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fjMMUrdI2Y90t3LLSMYLOB61xj0CGtAmMe3SVI5Fss=&emci=1601441c-defb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5232044e-60fe-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad.

For the first few years of my life, my family lived on an Indian reservation in Northern Montana. Dad was an OB-GYN – in the years before Roe v. Wade... | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64013886/408705711/729998634?refcode=20230529.2_AF_5BA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjMyMDQ0ZS02MGZlLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fjMMUrdI2Y90t3LLSMYLOB61xj0CGtAmMe3SVI5Fss=)
---
Years later, Dad recounted how he saw patients that came from all walks of life. Black, brown, and white. Younger and older. Rich and poor. And just as many Republicans walked through his doors as did Democrats.

Looking back, having a father who provided women with access to health care – especially at a time when so many were being denied the right – really shaped how I think about the issue.

My dad is in his 80’s and retired now, but for years, he helped train the next generation of health care providers at Planned Parenthood. And my sister, who later also became an OB-GYN, is continuing on his legacy.

**My opponent, Lauren Boebert, wants you to think that women having the freedom to make their own medical decisions is some extreme idea. It’s not.**

What’s extreme is Boebert pushing a bill in Congress that would make all abortions illegal – including in cases of rape or incest – and wanting to ban a medication that’s been approved for decades for abortions and miscarriages.

Boebert’s views are fringe ones – supported by people who think that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions, instead of allowing women the freedom to make choices with their doctor.

I would have thought that after almost losing her seat in Congress last year, Lauren Boebert might have at least pretended to moderate on this issue. But she’s only doubled down on the extreme.

**Only 546 votes separated Lauren Boebert and me in 2022, and I’m ready to finish the job in 2024.**

[**_Please, if you’re able to, will you consider splitting a donation between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? Our race was the closest in the country, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if I’m going to hold Boebert accountable and win._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64013887/408705712/729998634?refcode=20230529.2_AF_5BA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjMyMDQ0ZS02MGZlLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fjMMUrdI2Y90t3LLSMYLOB61xj0CGtAmMe3SVI5Fss=)

Thank you for letting me share some of my story with you.

With gratitude -
Adam
|

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Join Independence Day Parades Nationwide as a Supporter of Kennedy for President 2024!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=july_4th_parades&n=1)
---
Hi Peter, Team Kennedy has an exciting new initiative that everyone can take part in!

**We invite you to be a part of the sweeping nationwide movement to reach thousands locally and millions nationally in a single day.**

**Join Independence Day parades as supporters of Kennedy for President 2024! It’s a fun and family-friendly way to reach thousands in your community in a few hours.**

**Go to[Kennedy24.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/parades?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=july_4th_parades&n=2) and find a parade in your state that has already been posted and become a host or join in.**

**If you do not see a parade event listed near you, post and host an additional parade instead.**

**Invite your friends and neighbors to pave the way for TRUTH in the White House!**

Your support will spark people’s curiosity to hear Bobby speak for himself. Once they listen to him speak (not mainstream media speaking about him), most people join our movement. That’s one way you can help put a leader who speaks the truth into the White House.

To join, simply find a pre-listed parade near you and **[click the link to sign up as a volunteer](https://www.kennedy24.com/parades?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=july_4th_parades&n=3).** Volunteers receive a special link to purchase parade materials like banners, flyers, t-shirts, and buttons at discounted prices.

If you do not see a Kennedy24 parade host for your local parade, that means the opportunity is available for you. Being a host is fun, fulfilling, and connecting. A host purchases banners and flyers (you can ask volunteers to chip in). The host also organizes a meeting location, updates the other volunteers, passes out the t-shirts and other materials, and keeps everything running smoothly on parade day. You’ll also be on a special call with Bobby Kennedy and receive a gift as a token of our appreciation. Team Kennedy has sourced suppliers who make the parade materials in the USA, and all sales benefit the campaign, so thank you for your support!

Go to **[Kennedy24.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/parades?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=july_4th_parades&n=4)** now and Heal the Divide by inviting people to come together!

With Gratitude, Team Kennedy
[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=july_4th_parades&n=5)[http://www.kennedy24.com/](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=july_4th_parades&n=6)
* * *
PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=july_4th_parades&n=7).

[**May 29, 1790:** The process of ratifying the U.S. Constitution by the states took some time. It wasn't until May 29, 1790, that Rhode Island became the last state to ratify it. The first state to ratify was Delaware on December 7, 1787, followed by Pennsylvania on December 12, 1787.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d6811e8b396e4c80bc17ee18c0972647&_e=Qu1KhQzT64hevqjfVynVINFBw7c1kKZA7mI5y-YiWTWKp23svo2TEizgdHWQLWqijY1LqUPBVdhmLuJKc7ow-tvbW_Q1Ts-kJb-sv1Vm_srpfk3fYACq19RsJGT0IeNd1eHeJedesVPfrKfuCB_FwMAOhBJLUHWM9QtnKjTKKSzC6ch5a6ZoD3eMS7VX4DROfCdkG0tBpY98-xPQRGwC_cNikl8LiHh5mJrKXbB_wIJossPpZG8gde3KIDnuj65I) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d6811e8b396e4c80bc17ee18c0972647&_e=Qu1KhQzT64hevqjfVynVINFBw7c1kKZA7mI5y-YiWTWKp23svo2TEizgdHWQLWqijY1LqUPBVdhmLuJKc7ow-tvbW_Q1Ts-kJb-sv1Vm_spJIm23Dgu2qn7XTxWjqcHwYqSUkCmIOGHwLR46FyIqRHA6J1FzL1IsDvEqqUrvT9Z9S2krcUrX-OulgNvJ3L2OWRGKiA4VoqkwySKFtlVDhOsHbJLUhrZ3tizNUkXKGySRAc7wT8jVTkOTkvPFttin)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d6811e8b396e4c80bc17ee18c0972647&_e=Qu1KhQzT64hevqjfVynVII3CPhS4smim1bKFz5hM41KrJFV4Z2l3tHt13JIEuBCTwvWWzeyPP6jezrtXTch05F70KJN5vZXiXKgPm0ydYm_aC5cipOrEVkj86yWdNOmx6Oq0Ae_jo2jychJ5E70-DIcnS1DddEVDHY55L9PhF5jvqutXWW0s6VBdQQV3Fd-zZeNF5EHNdJKtfWpkohzOnVnSJNQYSyVwb5rdRc2XyIskaNYxRbkWe2CL_DGl8VD4)**

[**May 29, 1917:** JFK was born in Brookline, Massachusetts, and became the 35th President of the United States until his assassination in 1963. He was the youngest person to assume the presidency by election and the youngest president at the end of his tenure.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d6811e8b396e4c80bc17ee18c0972647&_e=Qu1KhQzT64hevqjfVynVIHrCwlHrJs1VFI-asofYQzTBCzf-RFGnwLd1VgqasqEG1UHkG_RUqoKKLJHe-He9OczJ2c-5EtQcM7VdoUofeq9mN9TFrZD3R_tTJoxragSTdMYlFFT5RUHFiFMSRsZ3y9dIG5xkgqJcsPdFVLYDZj4mNvpWBjr0dohhO33BMpPNtMtiAJI6RfWkLUT265YvtDiK1veLQiCUPIPh0HM5Mn91odNr0CcWxNJY8g86XKOhK1VSndx78euvY2zbP252NQ%3D%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d6811e8b396e4c80bc17ee18c0972647&_e=Qu1KhQzT64hevqjfVynVIHrCwlHrJs1VFI-asofYQzTBCzf-RFGnwLd1VgqasqEG1UHkG_RUqoKKLJHe-He9OczJ2c-5EtQcM7VdoUofeq9mN9TFrZD3R_tTJoxragSTgub0uDImzSaikbg3AqNDfoFJ2OqeNM3BdHJetE3OsY4Xg1NTAxMU3ByHhPzZKzPuyMm3harpOF9g78ntrSjty66jQsUYZ_LqAItmsncs6mdZHbxoTuJPX3cLjnnL-zKcT1ji29kV5LlRMEEQBM52ZQ%3D%3D)**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ece7b11-c06a-47fa-a6ea-8df0e98856d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Today we pause to remember those that fought for our freedom
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-aliiill-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Good Morning. Today we pause to remember those that fought for our freedom.**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-y/) **Debt Ceiling Deal** Biden and Kevin McCarthy **[have reached a tentative deal to raise the federal government's $31.4 trillion debt ceiling](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-j/)**, ending a months-long stalemate. A few colorful lawmakers are **[not happy with the deal](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-t/)**. **Inmates Rights?** A Los Angeles judge has **[ruled that holding inmates to cash bail when they can't afford to pay is a violation of their constitutional rights.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-i/) **_I thought they only had the right to remain silent._ **Trump Meets with Johnson** **[Former President Donald Trump met with former British Prime Minister Boris Johnson](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-d/) **this week as the latter toured the United States.

**FBI Bonus** Matt Gaetz said the **[FBI offers"cash payments" to incentivize key personnel to target conservative Americans](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-h/)** who may share views the establishment does not like. **Trafficking**** Children** The U.S. Marshals Service announced this week that it**[recovered 225 endangered missing children](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-k/) **during a 10-week national operation. [_**Here for the Laughs.**_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-u/)
* **[Safety tip](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-p/)** for your next BBQ.
* Me, trying to **[live my life](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* **[What](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-m/) **has he seen?
* **[How long](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-c/)?**

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-q/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-a/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-f/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aliiill-trhiujldw-z/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
1100 Johnson Rd #18546Golden, CO 80402 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-aliiill-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-e) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-aliiill-trhiujldw-s/)
---

Tanake, **** It’s Aminah, 7 Directions of Service Policy Director, writing with some [horrifying Mountain Valley Pipeline news.](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4YgPz3P_zVj17TzonAZ_A-fVozVvP89hKmiotlhKxNX5sDEXunUlnT2jR1pxZxIvXMIAmP0O0FViQjcLJANBAFsHujP0BlBitcoq3FHTZR9--zoyxBVLOszLjjhk6VBXUVqAIKJ8HGhjTxHoiVWie53NYyb4v9MeXKF5zgHZZf37Z50gRGvEj-B9fuVABPAjQcLKdhlbIUf4IrH0DCr6pmDl-GlaDa1njHA4QaypslYCZzpC5eAA866TsIgJt88vHH158dSQG-KKnrs_ETEO6K_7v6NtkERR_wtmLwnxzpyIIwb6OR14IJgPGovFki_je0v6B7e-5gYLgdatBVi5nUOoF-gQmt5cRZdl3CISv-8JbRxzW1n5h8VyFj7HvJQ8gZ_NycwxCR68X0yG6SKxkuOYsnjhFVe3wpS7rU6gHL8L5Q/3wl/OX13390rQhKwATwPEeWJhg/h1/5fqRmLcpeWwIai-gbTA6ScTkzk3_Q192eRh6vaTTFKM) Sunday evening, President Biden and House Republicans released text for their backroom debt ceiling deal, the "Fiscal Responsibility Act", which would force completion of the Mountain Valley Pipeline by granting all of the pipeline's authorizations and removing judicial review. The legislation includes several poison pills that would harm working class communities and the environment.

clean_body: Action alert! Call Congress to demand a clean debt ceiling! | | Tanake, **** It’s Aminah, 7 Directions of Service Policy Director, writing with some Sunday evening, President Biden and House Republicans released text for their backroom debt ceiling deal, the "Fiscal Responsibility Act", which would force completion of the Mountain Valley Pipeline by granting all of the pipeline's authorizations and removing judicial review. The legislation includes several poison pills that would harm working class communities and the environment. | TAKE ACTION! Tell Congress to vote for a clean debt bill and reject these poison pills using the call list and script below. Find additional resources in this which is updated each day. body:
His message ahead of our massive deadline.
| | Friend – in roughly 48 hours, we’ll have to officially close our books for the month of May.
---
But this isn’t _just_ any old deadline...
**...By 11:59 P.M. Wednesday night, not only could we prove that the entire Republican Party is UNITED behind Trump 2024 and our 50-point LEAD, we could OUTRAISE Crooked Joe Biden.**

Wednesday night, not only could we prove that the entire Republican Party is UNITED behind Trump 2024 and our 50-point LEAD, we could OUTRAISE Crooked Joe Biden. Over the course of a campaign, there are only a few select moments that are guaranteed to carry this kind of weight, but THIS deadline is that moment, Friend. Which is exactly why President Trump recorded a special video message just for YOU ahead of the end-of-month deadline. | Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Fri, May 26, 2023 Subject: There’s no other explanation To: <[dpwillis67@gmail.com]> | Friend, Just over a month ago, Crooked Joe Biden officially entered the race. But then, for weeks and weeks on end, his campaign REFUSED to report ANYTHING about his fundraising numbers. The only plausible explanation is that we OUTRAISED Biden and the radical Democrats during his launch month, and his campaign was too scared to report their fundraising numbers. Now, just DAYS away from the end-of-month deadline, we have the chance to deliver a blow to Crooked Joe that his campaign will NEVER be able to recover from... ...OUTRAISING him for the month of May. But first, let me just say that if you can’t afford to chip in right now due to Crooked Joe’s disastrous policies, please don’t even think about giving. Take care of your family and yourself first! And when I’m your President again, I’ll take care of YOU. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Molinaro?=
subject: Memorial Day Update from Rep. Marc Molinaro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US Inc
body:
Also with an update on the debt limit agreement... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dcb6a40f1ca6/molinaro-meets-with-schoharie-locals-on-inflation-law-enforcement-9329573?e=a39a20e5dd)
---
| |
---
| **\-- MEMORIAL DAY --**
---
| |
---
Today we pause to recognize the service and sacrifice of those who gave their last full measure of devotion to a grateful nation.

It's a debt we can never repay, but on this day let us recall their names, love their families who live on with loss, support the veterans among us and pray for the men and women standing guard around the world.
---
|
---
| **\-- DEBT LIMIT UPDATE \--**
---
| This weekend, Speaker McCarthy and President Biden announced a deal on the debt limit that bends spending, preserves vital programs, and grows the economy.

Details will be forthcoming, but I wanted to take this chance to update you on some of it's key elements.
---
| **BIPARTISANSHIP**

>From the start, I've pushed for a bipartisan agreement on dealing with the debt ceiling.

President Biden said he wouldn’t negotiate. He did and we struck a deal.

Bringing two sides together can be messy, but like it or not, Americans elected a bipartisan government.

Working together is how we move America forward. We will avoid a default AND bend the rate of unsustainable federal spending because governing-minded lawmakers like myself demanded it.
---
| **HISTORIC FEDERAL SPENDING CUTS**

Polls showed that an overwhelming majority of Americans wanted to rein in federal spending AND avoid a default. We did just that.

Commonsense tells you that when you're trillions in debt, you don't have a revenue problem, you have a spending problem.

We were able to help curb that problem, while still preserving vital programs.
---
| **SNAP/TANF REFORMS**

Beyond spending cuts, identifying areas for savings was also an essential component of this deal.

Reforms were made to SNAP/TANF to find and eliminate any waste or potential savings in order to ensure efficiency.
---
|
---
| I ran for Congress to represent ALL of New York 19 - and I'll continue to fight on behalf of all of our friends and neighbors, to ensure that all of us in Upstate NY have a voice.
---
| | | Paid for by Marc for US Inc.
---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Wild bees are running out of time
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1794587?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: The EPA might approve BEE-KILLING pesticides for the next 15 years -- putting vulnerable pollinators at high risk of EXTINCTION!** **[Act now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1794588?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Strawberries. Melons. Tomatoes. These are just a few of the fruits you might have had on the table this Memorial Day. But did you know that you have bees and other pollinators to thank for these delicious summer staples? That’s right, Friend -- from apples to summer squash, **your table would look BARE without bees. ** **But we’re losing bees at ALARMING rates.** And losing bees could also mean losing some of your favorite foods -- in fact, _almonds wouldn’t even exist without bees!_ A key driver in their decline is bee-killing pesticides called neonics, which have made U.S. agriculture nearly **48 TIMES MORE TOXIC** to bees in the past two decades. _**And the EPA could APPROVE bee-killing neonics for another 15 YEARS.**_ [**Please, sign your name NOW and tell the EPA to STOP the use of these pesticides before it’s too late for bees!! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1794589?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1794590?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Neonics don’t just hurt bees, Friend. As it turns out, the pesticides are found on the food you eat and CAN’T BE WASHED OFF. Neonics have been linked to health impacts like **birth defects of the heart and brain, hormone disruption, and autism.**
If the EPA approves neonics for another 15 years, it will be putting Big Ag’s profits above our pollinators and ecosystems and **threatening our health and food supply in the process.** Bees can’t afford to wait 15 years -- _**and neither can we.**_ We need to ACT NOW to save vulnerable pollinators. [**Please, Friend, will you sign your name immediately to stop neonics from KILLING bees and other pollinators? >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1794591?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1794590?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for taking urgent action for pollinators,
Friends of the Earth**
|

clean_body: It’s been a while | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Hey, It’s Ted Budd here. First, I’d like to say thank you for being on Team Budd — because of supporters like you, we were able to win a hard-fought race in a tough political environment. I am honored to be your Senator. Your continued support ensures that we have the resources we need to combat the Woke Left, stop the Biden agenda, and fight for our American way of life. Without you, our freedoms would be in peril. We can’t win this fight without your help. | With your support, we can stop out-of-control spending, secure our Southern border, defend parental rights in education, restore American strength, and protect the sanctity of life. Thanks in advance, Ted Budd | Senator Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader in North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

**I've been in politics for what we in the industry call a long-ass time. So I can tell you from experience: **
**Today's GOP is the greatest danger to our democracy, and I've never seen a political party like it. **
From election-undermining conspiracy theories, to abortion bans, to "Jim Crow 2.0" voter suppression laws, to gun violence inaction, to homophobic legislation, to banning books, to threatening to slash Medicare and Social Security...
**Friend, I don't say this lightly, but I'm 100% convinced that today's GOP simply doesn't care about the well-being of Americans.** And since they've already got a leg up for 2024, I'm truly nervous about what's going to happen next November.
**And you're probably wondering, how do we stop them? You deserve honesty. Friend: We need to fundraise the hell out of this year. **We need to raise as much money as possible so we can beat this ugly misinformation spin cycle the GOP has got us in.
I'm working with American Bridge to make sure we can do just that, but we're still $28,831 short of our $100,000 end-of-month goal. **[We're up against the GOP megadonors, so we can't come up short. Friend,
Thanks to you, President Trump has MAINTAINED his DOUBLE-DIGIT lead in the **FIRST 4 GOP PRIMARY STATES** of Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, and Nevada.
The more states we DOMINATE early on in the primary, the quicker the primary will end and the quicker our Party can come together and UNITE behind the frontrunner and standard bearer of the MAGA movement.
President Trump’s CHIEF GOAL is to FIRE Biden and win back the White House. ...That should be _EVERY_ Republican’s goal!
**But sadly, $200 MILLION is being spent by corrupt RINOs to torpedo President Trump in the primary.**
_They might as well just write a $200 million check directly to Crooked Joe, because that’s what they’re doing – dividing our Party and letting Biden sneak by unscathed._

name: Colin Allred
subject: Inside Elections just downgraded Ted Cruz's chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Have you heard?
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46234?t=6&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB) Friend, a lot of folks told me not to run against Ted Cruz.

They said a Democrat can't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger.

**And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice.**

**Already, the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of winning, and both Roll Call AND Inside Elections officially moved Texas from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground"!**

[Friend, all of these experts are putting Ted Cruz on notice because of the early strength of our grassroots campaign – but you know that GOP donors are taking notice, too. So please, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project before my critical end-of-month deadline to help fight back against the GOP, beat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? I need to raise $100,000 today →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46234?t=7&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46235?t=8&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46236?t=9&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46237?t=10&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46238?t=11&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46234?t=12&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB)
I've never felt better about our chances. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Texas may be Democrats' best pickup opportunity next year, CNN is calling Cruz one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot and, if we win in Texas, Democrats will hold the Senate Majority.

**But CBS News says this could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and with Senate control hanging in the balance, national Republicans are pouring money into Cruz's war chest. They've already launched their first attacks, and if we miss our fundraising goals, I won't have the resources to fight back.**

[That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46234?t=13&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46235?t=14&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46236?t=15&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46237?t=16&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46238?t=17&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46234?t=18&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB)
Let's do this.

Colin Allred
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7969%2E878179%2EUAh9hB).**
